/usr/bin/c++  -O3 -march=native -flto -Wall -Wextra -Werror -Wno-interference-size -fsanitize=address,undefined -fno-omit-frame-pointer -g  -fsanitize=address,undefined CMakeFiles/feed_handler.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/feed_handler.dir/src/feed_handler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/feed_handler.dir/src/order_book.cpp.o -o feed_handler
